title: Uncheck checklists in updates when item is duplicated
excerpt: We use the checklists in Updates to break out smaller parts of a task within an item. It would be great if we could duplicate the items for recurring tasks without having to go into each one and uncheck the checkboxes.

posts.author: cbrunskill (Catherine Brunskill)
posts.cookedHtml: We use the checklists in Updates to break out smaller parts of a task within an item. It would be great if we could duplicate the items for recurring tasks without having to go into each one and uncheck the checkboxes.
